ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "serial_number" INTEGER /* Serial number assigned to the applicant */,
  "account_info" TEXT /* Account information (e.g., bank account type) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the applicant */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status (e.g., employed, self-employed) */,
  "personal_status" TEXT /* Personal status (e.g., single, married) */,
  "resident_since" INTEGER /* Number of years the applicant has been a resident */,
  "telephone" TEXT /* Telephone availability (e.g., yes, no) */,
  "foreigner" TEXT /* Foreigner status (e.g., yes, no) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Applicant's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of residence */,
  "income" TEXT /* Applicant's annual income */,
  "credit_score" TEXT /* Applicant's credit score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant who applied for the loan */,
  "duration_month" INTEGER /* Duration of the loan in months */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the loan (e.g., personal, home, business) */,
  "installment_type" TEXT /* Type of installment (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "housing_type" TEXT /* Type of housing (e.g., own, rent) */,
  "credits_no" INTEGER /* Number of previous credits at this bank */,
  "job_type" TEXT /* Type of job (e.g., skilled, unskilled) */,
  "liables" INTEGER /* Number of dependents */,
  "loan_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the loan */,
  "interest_rate" TEXT /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  "loan_term" TEXT /* Term of the loan (e.g., fixed, variable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit history entry */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant */,
  "credit_history" TEXT /* Credit history (e.g., existing loans, previous delays) */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., real estate, car) */,
  "savings_account" TEXT /* Savings account status (e.g., amount, type) */,
  "guarantors" TEXT /* Guarantors (e.g., none, co-signer) */,
  "poi" INTEGER /* Points of interest (e.g., number of previous loans) */,
  "credit_card_debt" TEXT /* Credit card debt amount */,
  "student_loan_debt" TEXT /* Student loan debt amount */,
  "other_debt" TEXT /* Other debt amount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_history_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessment" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan application */,
  "risk_score" REAL /* Risk score assigned to the loan application */,
  "risk_category" TEXT /* Risk category (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the risk assessment was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessment_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collateral" (
  "collateral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collateral entry */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan application */,
  "collateral_type" TEXT /* Type of collateral (e.g., real estate, car, stocks) */,
  "collateral_value" REAL /* Value of the collateral */,
  "collateral_status" TEXT /* Status of the collateral (e.g., pledged, released) */,
  "collateral_description" TEXT /* Description of the collateral */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collateral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collateral_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan application */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the loan (e.g., approved, denied, under review) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was updated */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_status_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., loan officer, risk analyst, compliance officer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan application being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the loan application */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the loan application was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_payment_history" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment entry */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, overdue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_payment_history_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_history" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment entry */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant */,
  "employer_name" TEXT /* Name of the employer */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the applicant */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Status of the employment (e.g., current, previous) */,
  "employment_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the employment */,
  "employment_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the employment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_history_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_score_history" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit score entry */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant */,
  "credit_score" TEXT /* Credit score of the applicant */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date when the credit score was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_score_history_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)
